author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Structure plan: (1) init/python.rs — detect_python_prefix, read_pyproject, cpitd functions ~200 LOC. (2) init/signing.rs — setup_driver_signing ~80 LOC. (3) init/merge.rs — write_mcp_json_merged, write_settings_json_merged, write_root_gitignore ~200 LOC. (4) init/walkthrough.rs — InitWalkthroughApp, TuiChoices, all draw_ functions, run_tui_walkthrough, apply_tui_choices ~700 LOC. (5) init/mod.rs — embedded constants, InitUI, InitOpts, run, shell alias, repo compact ID ~800 LOC. Total: same code, 5 files.
